scores.correctness_notes: Core concept and library (charms.traefik_k8s ingress) are correct, but the gold standard recommends v1 while the agent uses v2. The gold standard also focuses on the databag schema (application-data with name/model/port, unit-data with host) which the agent omits entirely. The gold standard explicitly notes that charmlibs docs cover interface specs/schemas rather than Python API, yet the agent leads with Python API details.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — IngressPerAppRequirer, IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent, on.ready/on.revoked events, url property, and provide_ingress_requirements() all genuinely exist in the traefik-k8s library
